'''''Star Wars: Millennium Falcon Challenge''''' was a game created for the [[Wikipedia:R-Zone|R-Zone]] handheld gaming system in [[1997]]. Millennium Falcon Challenge consists of moving [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|Millennium Falcon]] between 3 different positions to avoid oncoming [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]]s and to shoot at passing [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/ln space superiority starfighter]]s, the ladder of which grants the player points.

{{Game-stub}}

==Publisher's summary==
''*''Take control of the ''Millennium Falcon''!''''
''*''Take on the Empire through 4 high-flying levels of space combat!''''
''*''Authentic'' Star Wars '' sound effects!''''
